CustomField.formula: IF( OR( ISNULL(SurveyReferencePriceEstimated__c), SurveyReferencePriceEstimated__c == 0, ISNULL(SurveyReferencePrice__c), SurveyReferencePrice__c == 0 ), NULL, ABS(SurveyReferencePriceEstimated__c / SurveyReferencePrice__c) )
CustomField.inlineHelpText: 調査基準価格 推定価格／公表価格
CustomField.label: 調査基準価格 推定差異
